title: 0-to-1 Analytics Stack @ The Ken
tagline: Event tracking · Data warehouse · ML workflows
description: Built The Ken's entire analytics infrastructure from scratch — Mixpanel for event tracking, BigQuery + dbt for the data warehouse, and ML pipelines for subscriber engagement scoring. Reduced data requests by 95%.

title: Engagement Score — RFV Framework
description: Developed a bespoke Engagement Score and Customer Activation metric using the RFV (Recency-Frequency-Value) framework to predict subscriber churn and renewal propensity for 50K+ paying subscribers.

title: Stanford Behavioral Science Study
description: Co-led an 18-month behavioral science experiment across India with Prof. Szu-chi Huang (Stanford University), testing strategies for nudging late-starting salespeople out of inefficient behavior patterns.

title: Procurement ML Optimizer
description: Built multiple machine learning models to optimize resource allocation for the Procurement Department at WNS, covering $400M+ annual spend. Separately improved AP Invoice TAT prediction from 25% to 70% accuracy.

title: Water ATM Market Research
tagline: Survey design across 3 metro cities — 1,000+ responses
description: Conducted independent market research for a seed-stage water fountain startup. Designed and oversaw a survey across three metro cities, collecting and analyzing over 1,000 responses using Excel and Python.

title: This Portfolio
description: The site you're on right now. Built with zero frameworks — pure HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS. Content managed via JSON files. Deployable anywhere: GitHub Pages, Netlify, or Vercel.
